context: Tests whether the agent applies swiftui-patterns state ownership and actor-isolation guidance without overgeneralizing.

checklist.name: Nuanced main actor isolation
checklist.description: Uses `@MainActor` for UI-bound observable stores or view models, but does not require every observable or DTO/domain model to be main-actor isolated.

checklist.name: Correct ownership wrapper
checklist.description: Uses `@State` in the owning SwiftUI view for the observable store lifecycle.

checklist.name: Bindable only for bindings
checklist.description: Uses `@Bindable` in child views or local environment variables only when `$property` bindings are needed.

checklist.name: Environment routing
checklist.description: Uses type-keyed `@Environment(ProfileSettingsStore.self)` for deeply shared observable state instead of legacy `@EnvironmentObject`.

checklist.name: Async task lifecycle
checklist.description: Uses `.task` or `.task(id:)` for suggestion loading and mentions automatic cancellation when the view disappears or the task id changes.

checklist.name: AppStorage caveat
checklist.description: Avoids `@AppStorage` inside the observable store for view reactivity; recommends view-level `@AppStorage` or normal UserDefaults-backed stored properties in the store.
